query:
SELECT c.id, c.vehicle_registration, c.vehicle_make, c.vehicle_model, c.insured_name, c.status
FROM claims c
WHERE c.vehicle_make LIKE '%Isuzu%' OR c.vehicle_model LIKE '%D-Max%' OR c.vehicle_model LIKE '%D Max%' OR c.insured_name LIKE '%Zikhali%'
LIMIT 10
